title: 5 things a man of God builds in his 20s
caption:
These years don't repeat.

Here's what a man of God makes sure they build in him:

1. A body he governs. The gym isn't about looks — it's where you learn to keep a promise to yourself. Nobody makes you go. That's the point.

2. A skill worth having. Your 20s are the forge, not the waiting room. Learn to do something people count on. Useful beats impressive.

3. One war you're winning. You don't 'work on' sin — you put it to death. The porn, the phone, the thing you lock the screen over. Name it. Cut the access. Get a man who can ask you about it.

4. One real brother. Not a group chat. Not a podcast. One guy with your actual number who knows your sin and shows up anyway.

5. The first hour. The Word before the notifications. The quiet before the calendar. The man you're becoming gets built in the hours no one sees.

The 20s don't wait. Neither does the man worth being.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
